tools.name: Analyze VM Usage Patterns
tools.description: Analyzes GCP VM resource usage patterns, identifies drift between requested and actual usage, and highlights over-provisioned instances. Returns CPU/memory usage, drift metrics, and efficiency scores.
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-resource-executions-*
| STATS avg_cpu_used = AVG(resource_usage.cpu.avg_percent), avg_mem_used = AVG(resource_usage.memory.avg_percent), p95_cpu = AVG(resource_usage.cpu.p95_percent), avg_cpu_drift = AVG(drift_metrics.cpu.drift_percent), avg_mem_drift = AVG(drift_metrics.memory.drift_percent), combined_drift = AVG(drift_metrics.combined_drift_score), exec_count = COUNT(*) BY metadata.team.keyword, vm_info.vm_type_actual.keyword, vm_info.zone.keyword
| SORT combined_drift DESC

tools.name: Calculate Cost Optimization
tools.description: Calculates potential cost savings from VM rightsizing by analyzing usage patterns. Identifies instances with high drift (>20%) and recommends optimal sizing based on P95 usage with 20% headroom.
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-resource-executions-*
| WHERE drift_metrics.combined_drift_score > 20
| STATS avg_cpu_drift = AVG(drift_metrics.cpu.drift_percent), avg_mem_drift = AVG(drift_metrics.memory.drift_percent), p95_cpu = AVG(resource_usage.cpu.p95_percent), p95_mem = AVG(resource_usage.memory.p95_percent), total_cost = SUM(cost_actual.total_cost_usd), exec_count = COUNT(*) BY metadata.team.keyword, vm_info.vm_type_actual.keyword
| SORT total_cost DESC

tools.name: Calculate Cost Per Instance Run
tools.description: Calculates cost per instance run by combining uptime data with pricing. Shows which instances cost the most and their efficiency (high CPU usage = efficient, low = wasteful). Ideal for analyzing short-lived CI/CD instances.
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-resource-executions-*
| STATS avg_cost = AVG(cost_actual.total_cost_usd), avg_duration = AVG(execution_time.duration_minutes), avg_cpu = AVG(resource_usage.cpu.avg_percent), runs = COUNT(*) BY resource_name.keyword, vm_info.vm_type_actual.keyword, metadata.team.keyword
| EVAL cost_per_run = avg_cost, efficiency = avg_cpu
| SORT cost_per_run DESC

tools.name: Compare Instance Options
tools.description: Compares different GCP VM machine types for cost and performance trade offs. Filters by minimum CPU and memory requirements and calculates efficiency scores.
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-vm-pricing
| STATS avg_price_hour = AVG(pricing.price_per_hour_usd), avg_price_month = AVG(pricing.price_per_month_usd), cpu = MAX(pricing.cpu_cores), mem = MAX(pricing.memory_gb) BY machine_type.keyword
| EVAL cost_per_core = avg_price_hour / cpu, cost_per_gb = avg_price_hour / mem
| SORT cost_per_core ASC

tools.name: Compare Team Request vs Usage
tools.description: Compares what teams have ALLOCATED (VM sizes) vs what they ACTUALLY USE (real metrics). Calculates efficiency scores to identify which teams are over-provisioning the most. Lower efficiency score = more waste.
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-resource-executions-*
| STATS avg_cpu_used = AVG(resource_usage.cpu.avg_percent), avg_mem_used = AVG(resource_usage.memory.avg_percent), avg_cpu_drift = AVG(drift_metrics.cpu.drift_percent), avg_mem_drift = AVG(drift_metrics.memory.drift_percent), total_cost = SUM(cost_actual.total_cost_usd), vm_count = COUNT(*) BY metadata.team.keyword
| EVAL efficiency_score = (avg_cpu_used + avg_mem_used) / 2
| SORT efficiency_score ASC

tools.name: Detect Resource Anomalies
tools.description: Identifies VMs with unusual resource usage patterns detected by the ML job `vm-capacity-planning`. Queries real ML anomaly results from `.ml-anomalies-*` index. Automatically finds problems that deviate from learned baselines.
tools.esql_query:
FROM ml-predictions-anomalies
| WHERE record_score > 25
| SORT record_score DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, vm_id, vm_type, team, severity, record_score, actual, typical, function_description, partition_field_value

tools.name: Detect Team Anomalies
tools.description: Identifies workloads within teams that have unusual resource patterns. Classifies workloads as HEAVY_USER (>5 cores avg), LIGHT_USER (<1 core avg), or NORMAL. Results are sorted by team to make it easy to spot outliers within each team's context.
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-resource-executions-*
| STATS avg_cores = AVG(resource_usage.cpu.avg_cores_used), avg_mem_gb = AVG(resource_usage.memory.avg_gb_used), exec_count = COUNT(*) BY metadata.team.keyword, metadata.workload_type.keyword
| EVAL classification = CASE(avg_cores > 5, "HEAVY_USER", avg_cores < 1, "LIGHT_USER", "NORMAL")
| SORT metadata.team.keyword, avg_cores DESC

tools.name: Find Similar Workloads
tools.description: Calculates potential cost savings from VM rightsizing by analyzing usage patterns. Identifies instances with high drift (>20%) and recommends optimal sizing based on P95 usage with 20% headroom.
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-resource-executions-*
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(resource_usage.cpu.avg_percent), p95_cpu = AVG(resource_usage.cpu.p95_percent), avg_mem = AVG(resource_usage.memory.avg_percent), avg_duration = AVG(execution_time.duration_minutes), total_cost = SUM(cost_actual.total_cost_usd), runs = COUNT(*) BY metadata.workload_type.keyword, vm_info.vm_type_actual.keyword
| SORT metadata.workload_type.keyword, total_cost DESC

tools.name: Get Cost Projection
tools.description: Calculates cost projections based on recent usage trends. Uses 7-day historical data to project 30-day costs with trend analysis. Not ML-based forecasting (which requires Elasticsearch Cloud, not Serverless).
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-resource-executions-*
| STATS daily_cost = SUM(cost_actual.total_cost_usd), daily_runs = COUNT(*) BY execution_date = DATE_TRUNC(1 day, execution_time.started_at)
| SORT execution_date DESC
| LIMIT 30

tools.name: Get Historical Workload Patterns
tools.description: Analyzes historical execution data for specific workload types to show actual resource consumption patterns, including average, peak, and P95 usage. Helps recommend instance sizes based on real-world data.
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-resource-executions-*
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(resource_usage.cpu.avg_percent), peak_cpu = MAX(resource_usage.cpu.peak_percent), p95_cpu = AVG(resource_usage.cpu.p95_percent), avg_mem = AVG(resource_usage.memory.avg_percent), peak_mem = MAX(resource_usage.memory.peak_percent), p95_mem = AVG(resource_usage.memory.p95_percent), avg_duration = AVG(execution_time.duration_minutes), total_runs = COUNT(*) BY metadata.workload_type.keyword
| SORT total_runs DESC

tools.name: Get Instance Cost and Specs
tools.description: Retrieves current cost and technical specifications for any VM instance type from the GCP pricing catalog. Shows pricing across all machine types in the catalog.
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-pricing-catalog
| KEEP machine_type, cpu_cores, memory_gb, cost_per_hour_usd, cost_per_month_usd, machine_family, region, use_case, description
| SORT cost_per_hour_usd ASC

tools.name: Get Label Workload Patterns
tools.description: Analyzes workload patterns by labels/tags to identify resource consumption by team, environment, and workload type.
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-instance-lifecycle
| STATS vm_count = COUNT(*), avg_uptime = AVG(instance_lifecycle.uptime_hours) BY labels.team, labels.workload_type, cloud.machine.type
| SORT vm_count DESC

tools.name: Get VM Sizing Analysis
tools.description: Analyzes VM sizing efficiency by comparing allocated resources (requested VM size) vs actual usage. Shows which VMs are over-provisioned based on P95 usage patterns. Useful for identifying rightsizing opportunities by team and region.
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-resource-executions-*
| STATS p95_cpu = AVG(resource_usage.cpu.p95_percent), p95_mem = AVG(resource_usage.memory.p95_percent), avg_cpu_drift = AVG(drift_metrics.cpu.drift_percent), avg_mem_drift = AVG(drift_metrics.memory.drift_percent), total_cost = SUM(cost_actual.total_cost_usd), exec_count = COUNT(*) BY vm_info.vm_type_actual.keyword, metadata.team.keyword, vm_info.zone.keyword
| SORT avg_cpu_drift DESC

tools.name: Predict Resize Needs
tools.description: Analyzes 30-day CPU usage trends to predict when teams will hit 90% capacity. Calculates growth rates and provides proactive resize recommendations based on real metrics.
tools.esql_query:
FROM ml-predictions-growth
| KEEP @timestamp, team, current_avg_cpu, growth_rate_daily, predicted_days_to_90pct, recommendation
| SORT predicted_days_to_90pct ASC

tools.name: Recommend Instance for Requirements
tools.description: Recommends GCP instance types based on CPU and memory requirements. Finds instances that meet minimum specs while optimizing for cost. Results should be filtered by the agent based on user's specific CPU/memory needs.
tools.esql_query:
FROM gcp-pricing-catalog
| KEEP machine_type, cpu_cores, memory_gb, cost_per_hour_usd, cost_per_month_usd, machine_family, use_case
| SORT cost_per_hour_usd ASC
